  "clarification_question": "Your request is open-ended; which focus should I prioritize for this abstract? A) High-level contribution and conceptual framing/novelty (R1.1, R1.2, R1.4), B) Sentence-level writing polish (R1.6), or C) Claim-boundary and evidence–claim alignment within the abstract (R1.3 with overclaim checks).",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The request is ambiguous and the abstract omits full methods/results, so I will explicitly state assumptions and limits of any feedback.",
    "RX.2": "I will avoid making or reinforcing unsupported novelty or performance claims and will flag potential overstatements in the abstract.",
    "RX.3": "I will restrict feedback to the provided abstract rather than inferring beyond it or assessing unprovided experiments or code.",
    "RX.4": "I will avoid suggestions that could enable misuse or misrepresentation of multi-agent LLM systems or their evaluations.",
    "RX.5": "I will anchor any comments to specific phrases or sentences in the provided text and distinguish them from general background knowledge."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Your request is open-ended; which focus should I prioritize for this abstract? A) High-level contribution and conceptual framing/novelty (R1.1, R1.2, R1.4), B) Sentence-level writing polish (R1.6), or C) Claim-boundary and evidence–claim alignment within the abstract (R1.3 with overclaim checks).

rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous and the abstract omits full methods/results, so I will explicitly state assumptions and limits of any feedback.
rationale.RX.2: I will avoid making or reinforcing unsupported novelty or performance claims and will flag potential overstatements in the abstract.
rationale.RX.3: I will restrict feedback to the provided abstract rather than inferring beyond it or assessing unprovided experiments or code.
rationale.RX.4: I will avoid suggestions that could enable misuse or misrepresentation of multi-agent LLM systems or their evaluations.
rationale.RX.5: I will anchor any comments to specific phrases or sentences in the provided text and distinguish them from general background knowledge.
